creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
> When installing from "pkg_add", nmap looks for libpcap.so.7.
> Current: libpcap.so.8
> Reinstalling from source resolves the issue.

Hi Mark,

the packages for FreeBSD 9.0-RC1 where build before the library
version for OS libs was bumped. I don't know the time when the
packages for RC will be updated again, but the issue will be solved
the time final packages for 9.0 are build and published.

There is no way for me to force a package build which publish an
updated package.

--
Regards,
olli
